--- grant_on_sequence_multi.sql
GRANT SELECT, UPDATE ON SEQUENCE s1, sch.s2 TO ROLE r1, r2
--- AST
&ast.Grant{
  Privilege: &ast.PrivilegeOnSequence{
    Privileges: []ast.TablePrivilege{
      &ast.SelectPrivilege{
        Select: 6,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
      &ast.UpdatePrivilege{
        Update: 14,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
    },
    Names: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 33,
            NameEnd: 35,
            Name:    "s1",
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 37,
            NameEnd: 40,
            Name:    "sch",
          },
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 41,
            NameEnd: 43,
            Name:    "s2",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 52,
      NameEnd: 54,
      Name:    "r1",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 56,
      NameEnd: 58,
      Name:    "r2",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT SELECT, UPDATE ON SEQUENCE s1, sch.s2 TO ROLE r1, r2
